news.t: BlackRock Updates Multifactor ETF Suite to Serve as Portfolio Building Blocks
Analysts Expect The iShares Edge MSCI Multifactor USA ETF To Hit $35
Implied iShares Edge MSCI Multifactor USA ETF Analyst Target Price: $35

holdings.infoBox: LRGF is an equity ETF with a total of 297 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.53%, Apple at 6.40%, Microsoft at 4.17%, Amazon.com at 3.07%, and Broadcom at 3.00%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Equity Factor ETF (LRGF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the STOXX U.S. Equity Factor index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap equities. Stocks are selected and weighted to maximize exposure to five factors: momentum, quality, value, low volatility, and size. LRGF was launched on Apr 30, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Updates Multifactor ETF Suite to Serve as Portfolio Building Blocks
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Effective today, BlackRock implemented changes to the iShares Multifactor suite, bringing enhanced systematic multifactor investing capabilities to the foundation of portfol...

data.title: Analysts Expect The iShares Edge MSCI Multifactor USA ETF To Hit $35
data.text: For the iShares Edge MSCI Multifactor USA ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $35.33 per unit.
